controls.title: Legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood, managed, and documented
controls.description: Legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood, managed, and documented

controls.title: The characteristics of trustworthy AI are integrated into organizational policies, processes, procedures, and practices
controls.description: The characteristics of trustworthy AI are integrated into organizational policies, processes, procedures, and practices

controls.title: Processes, procedures, and practices are in place to determine the needed level of risk management activities
controls.description: Processes, procedures, and practices are in place to determine the needed level of risk management activities

controls.title: The risk management process and its outcomes are established through transparent policies, procedures, and other controls
controls.description: The risk management process and its outcomes are established through transparent policies, procedures, and other controls

controls.title: Ongoing monitoring and periodic review of the risk management process and its outcomes are planned and organizational roles and responsibilities clearly defined
controls.description: Ongoing monitoring and periodic review of the risk management process and its outcomes are planned and organizational roles and responsibilities clearly defined

controls.title: Mechanisms are in place to inventory AI systems and are resourced according to organizational risk priorities
controls.description: Mechanisms are in place to inventory AI systems and are resourced according to organizational risk priorities

controls.title: Processes and procedures are in place for decommissioning and phasing out AI systems safely
controls.description: Processes and procedures are in place for decommissioning and phasing out AI systems safely

controls.title: Roles and responsibilities and lines of communication related to mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks are documented
controls.description: Roles and responsibilities and lines of communication related to mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks are documented

controls.title: The organization's personnel and partners receive AI risk management training
controls.description: The organization's personnel and partners receive AI risk management training

controls.title: Executive leadership of the organization takes responsibility for decisions about risks associated with AI system development and deployment
controls.description: Executive leadership of the organization takes responsibility for decisions about risks associated with AI system development and deployment

controls.title: Decision-making related to mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks throughout the lifecycle is informed by a diverse team
controls.description: Decision-making related to mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks throughout the lifecycle is informed by a diverse team

controls.title: Policies and procedures are in place to define and differentiate roles and responsibilities for human-AI configurations and oversight
controls.description: Policies and procedures are in place to define and differentiate roles and responsibilities for human-AI configurations and oversight

controls.title: Organizational policies and practices are in place to foster a critical thinking and safety-first mindset
controls.description: Organizational policies and practices are in place to foster a critical thinking and safety-first mindset

controls.title: Organizational teams document the risks and potential impacts of the AI technology they design, develop, deploy, evaluate, and use
controls.description: Organizational teams document the risks and potential impacts of the AI technology they design, develop, deploy, evaluate, and use

controls.title: Organizational practices are in place to enable AI testing, identification of incidents, and information sharing
controls.description: Organizational practices are in place to enable AI testing, identification of incidents, and information sharing

controls.title: Organizational policies and practices are in place to collect, consider, prioritize, and integrate feedback from those external to the team that developed or deployed the AI system
controls.description: Organizational policies and practices are in place to collect, consider, prioritize, and integrate feedback from those external to the team that developed or deployed the AI system

controls.title: Mechanisms are established to enable the team that developed or deployed AI systems to regularly incorporate adjudicated feedback from relevant AI actors into system design and implementation
controls.description: Mechanisms are established to enable the team that developed or deployed AI systems to regularly incorporate adjudicated feedback from relevant AI actors into system design and implementation

controls.title: Policies and procedures are in place that address AI risks associated with third-party entities
controls.description: Policies and procedures are in place that address AI risks associated with third-party entities

controls.title: Contingency processes are in place to handle failures or incidents in third-party data or AI systems deemed to be high-risk
controls.description: Contingency processes are in place to handle failures or incidents in third-party data or AI systems deemed to be high-risk

controls.title: Intended purposes, potentially beneficial uses, context-specific laws, norms and expectations, and prospective settings in which the AI system will be deployed are understood and documented
controls.description: Intended purposes, potentially beneficial uses, context-specific laws, norms and expectations, and prospective settings in which the AI system will be deployed are understood and documented

controls.title: Inter-disciplinary AI actors, competencies, skills, and capacities for establishing context reflect demographic diversity and broad domain and user experience expertise
controls.description: Inter-disciplinary AI actors, competencies, skills, and capacities for establishing context reflect demographic diversity and broad domain and user experience expertise

controls.title: The organization's mission and relevant goals for AI technology are understood and documented
controls.description: The organization's mission and relevant goals for AI technology are understood and documented

controls.title: The business value or context of business use has been clearly defined or — in the case of assessing existing AI systems — re-evaluated
controls.description: The business value or context of business use has been clearly defined or — in the case of assessing existing AI systems — re-evaluated

controls.title: Organizational risk tolerances are determined and documented
controls.description: Organizational risk tolerances are determined and documented

controls.title: System requirements are elicited from and understood by relevant AI actors
controls.description: System requirements are elicited from and understood by relevant AI actors

controls.title: The specific tasks and methods used to implement the tasks that the AI system will support are defined
controls.description: The specific tasks and methods used to implement the tasks that the AI system will support are defined

controls.title: Information about the AI system's knowledge limits and how system output may be utilized and overseen by humans is documented
controls.description: Information about the AI system's knowledge limits and how system output may be utilized and overseen by humans is documented

controls.title: Scientific integrity and TEVV considerations are identified and documented, including those related to experimental design, data collection and selection, system trustworthiness, and construct validation
controls.description: Scientific integrity and TEVV considerations are identified and documented, including those related to experimental design, data collection and selection, system trustworthiness, and construct validation

controls.title: Potential benefits of intended AI system functionality and performance are examined and documented
controls.description: Potential benefits of intended AI system functionality and performance are examined and documented

controls.title: Potential costs, including non-monetary costs, which result from expected or realized AI errors or system functionality and trustworthiness are examined and documented
controls.description: Potential costs, including non-monetary costs, which result from expected or realized AI errors or system functionality and trustworthiness are examined and documented

controls.title: Targeted application scope is specified and documented based on the system's capability, established context, and AI system categorization
controls.description: Targeted application scope is specified and documented based on the system's capability, established context, and AI system categorization

controls.title: Processes for operator and practitioner proficiency with AI system performance and trustworthiness — and relevant technical standards and certifications — are defined
controls.description: Processes for operator and practitioner proficiency with AI system performance and trustworthiness — and relevant technical standards and certifications — are defined

controls.title: Processes for human oversight are defined, assessed, and documented in accordance with organizational policies
controls.description: Processes for human oversight are defined, assessed, and documented in accordance with organizational policies

controls.title: Approaches for mapping AI technology and legal risks of its components — including the use of third-party data or software — are in place, followed, and documented
controls.description: Approaches for mapping AI technology and legal risks of its components — including the use of third-party data or software — are in place, followed, and documented

controls.title: Internal risk controls for components of the AI system, including third-party AI technologies, are identified and documented
controls.description: Internal risk controls for components of the AI system, including third-party AI technologies, are identified and documented

controls.title: Likelihood and magnitude of each identified impact (both potentially beneficial and harmful) based on expected use, past uses of AI systems in similar contexts, public incident reports, feedback from those external to the team that developed or deployed the AI system, or other data are identified and documented
controls.description: Likelihood and magnitude of each identified impact (both potentially beneficial and harmful) based on expected use, past uses of AI systems in similar contexts, public incident reports, feedback from those external to the team that developed or deployed the AI system, or other data are identified and documented

controls.title: Practices and personnel for supporting regular engagement with relevant AI actors and integrating feedback about positive, negative, and unanticipated impacts are in place and documented
controls.description: Practices and personnel for supporting regular engagement with relevant AI actors and integrating feedback about positive, negative, and unanticipated impacts are in place and documented

controls.title: Approaches and metrics for measurement of AI risks enumerated during the MAP function are selected for implementation
controls.description: Approaches and metrics for measurement of AI risks enumerated during the MAP function are selected for implementation

controls.title: Appropriateness of AI metrics and effectiveness of existing controls are regularly assessed and updated
controls.description: Appropriateness of AI metrics and effectiveness of existing controls are regularly assessed and updated

controls.title: Internal experts who did not serve as front-line developers for the system and/or independent assessors are involved in regular assessments and updates
controls.description: Internal experts who did not serve as front-line developers for the system and/or independent assessors are involved in regular assessments and updates

controls.title: Test sets, metrics, and details about the tools used during TEVV are documented
controls.description: Test sets, metrics, and details about the tools used during TEVV are documented

controls.title: Evaluations involving human subjects meet applicable requirements — including human subject protection — and are representative of the relevant population
controls.description: Evaluations involving human subjects meet applicable requirements — including human subject protection — and are representative of the relevant population

controls.title: AI system performance or assurance criteria are measured qualitatively or quantitatively and demonstrated for conditions similar to deployment setting(s)
controls.description: AI system performance or assurance criteria are measured qualitatively or quantitatively and demonstrated for conditions similar to deployment setting(s)

controls.title: The functionality and behavior of the AI system and its components — as identified in the MAP function — are monitored when in production
controls.description: The functionality and behavior of the AI system and its components — as identified in the MAP function — are monitored when in production

controls.title: The AI system to be deployed is demonstrated to be valid and reliable
controls.description: The AI system to be deployed is demonstrated to be valid and reliable

controls.title: The AI system is evaluated regularly for safety risks
controls.description: The AI system is evaluated regularly for safety risks

controls.title: AI system security and resilience — as identified in the MAP function — are evaluated and documented
controls.description: AI system security and resilience — as identified in the MAP function — are evaluated and documented

controls.title: Risks associated with transparency and accountability — as identified in the MAP function — are examined and documented
controls.description: Risks associated with transparency and accountability — as identified in the MAP function — are examined and documented

controls.title: The AI model is explained, validated, and documented, and AI system output is interpreted within its context — as identified in the MAP function — to inform responsible use and governance
controls.description: The AI model is explained, validated, and documented, and AI system output is interpreted within its context — as identified in the MAP function — to inform responsible use and governance

controls.title: Privacy risk of the AI system — as identified in the MAP function — is examined and documented
controls.description: Privacy risk of the AI system — as identified in the MAP function — is examined and documented

controls.title: Fairness and bias — as identified in the MAP function — are evaluated and results are documented
controls.description: Fairness and bias — as identified in the MAP function — are evaluated and results are documented

controls.title: Environmental impact and sustainability of AI model training and management activities — as identified in the MAP function — are assessed and documented
controls.description: Environmental impact and sustainability of AI model training and management activities — as identified in the MAP function — are assessed and documented

controls.title: Effectiveness of the employed TEVV metrics and processes in the MEASURE function are evaluated and documented
controls.description: Effectiveness of the employed TEVV metrics and processes in the MEASURE function are evaluated and documented

controls.title: Approaches, personnel, and documentation are in place to regularly identify and track existing, unanticipated, and emergent AI risks based on factors such as intended and actual performance in deployed contexts
controls.description: Approaches, personnel, and documentation are in place to regularly identify and track existing, unanticipated, and emergent AI risks based on factors such as intended and actual performance in deployed contexts

controls.title: Risk tracking approaches are considered for settings where AI risks are difficult to assess using currently available measurement techniques or where metrics are not yet available
controls.description: Risk tracking approaches are considered for settings where AI risks are difficult to assess using currently available measurement techniques or where metrics are not yet available

controls.title: Feedback processes for end users and impacted communities to report problems and appeal system outcomes are established and integrated into AI system evaluation metrics
controls.description: Feedback processes for end users and impacted communities to report problems and appeal system outcomes are established and integrated into AI system evaluation metrics

controls.title: Measurement approaches for identifying AI risks are connected to deployment context(s) and informed through consultation with domain experts and other end users
controls.description: Measurement approaches for identifying AI risks are connected to deployment context(s) and informed through consultation with domain experts and other end users

controls.title: Measurement results regarding AI system trustworthiness in deployment context(s) and across the AI lifecycle are informed by input from domain experts and relevant AI actors to validate whether the system is performing consistently as intended
controls.description: Measurement results regarding AI system trustworthiness in deployment context(s) and across the AI lifecycle are informed by input from domain experts and relevant AI actors to validate whether the system is performing consistently as intended

controls.title: Measurable performance improvements or declines based on consultations with relevant AI actors, including affected communities, and field data about context-relevant risks and trustworthiness characteristics are identified and documented
controls.description: Measurable performance improvements or declines based on consultations with relevant AI actors, including affected communities, and field data about context-relevant risks and trustworthiness characteristics are identified and documented

controls.title: A determination is made as to whether the AI system achieves its intended purpose and stated objectives and whether its development or deployment should proceed
controls.description: A determination is made as to whether the AI system achieves its intended purpose and stated objectives and whether its development or deployment should proceed

controls.title: Treatment of documented AI risks is prioritized based on impact, likelihood, and available resources or methods
controls.description: Treatment of documented AI risks is prioritized based on impact, likelihood, and available resources or methods

controls.title: Responses to the AI risks deemed high priority — as identified by the MAP function — are developed, planned, and documented
controls.description: Responses to the AI risks deemed high priority — as identified by the MAP function — are developed, planned, and documented

controls.title: Negative residual risks (defined as the sum of all unmitigated risks) to both downstream acquirers of AI systems and end users are documented
controls.description: Negative residual risks (defined as the sum of all unmitigated risks) to both downstream acquirers of AI systems and end users are documented

controls.title: Resources required to manage AI risks are taken into account, along with viable non-AI alternative systems, approaches, or methods to reduce the magnitude or likelihood of potential impacts
controls.description: Resources required to manage AI risks are taken into account, along with viable non-AI alternative systems, approaches, or methods to reduce the magnitude or likelihood of potential impacts

controls.title: Mechanisms are in place and applied to sustain the value of deployed AI systems
controls.description: Mechanisms are in place and applied to sustain the value of deployed AI systems

controls.title: Procedures are followed to respond to and recover from a previously unknown risk when it is identified
controls.description: Procedures are followed to respond to and recover from a previously unknown risk when it is identified

controls.title: Mechanisms are in place and applied, and responsibilities are assigned and understood, to supersede, disengage, or deactivate AI systems that demonstrate performance or outcomes inconsistent with intended use
controls.description: Mechanisms are in place and applied, and responsibilities are assigned and understood, to supersede, disengage, or deactivate AI systems that demonstrate performance or outcomes inconsistent with intended use

controls.title: AI risks and benefits from third-party resources are regularly monitored, and risk controls are applied and documented
controls.description: AI risks and benefits from third-party resources are regularly monitored, and risk controls are applied and documented

controls.title: Pre-trained models which are used for development are monitored as part of AI system regular monitoring and maintenance
controls.description: Pre-trained models which are used for development are monitored as part of AI system regular monitoring and maintenance

controls.title: Post-deployment AI system monitoring plans are implemented, including mechanisms for capturing and evaluating input from users and other relevant AI actors, appeal and override, decommissioning, incident response, recovery, and change management
controls.description: Post-deployment AI system monitoring plans are implemented, including mechanisms for capturing and evaluating input from users and other relevant AI actors, appeal and override, decommissioning, incident response, recovery, and change management

controls.title: Measurable activities for continual improvements are integrated into AI system updates and include regular engagement with interested parties, including relevant AI actors
controls.description: Measurable activities for continual improvements are integrated into AI system updates and include regular engagement with interested parties, including relevant AI actors

controls.title: Incidents and errors are communicated to relevant AI actors, including affected communities. Processes for tracking, responding to, and recovering from incidents and errors are followed and documented
controls.description: Incidents and errors are communicated to relevant AI actors, including affected communities. Processes for tracking, responding to, and recovering from incidents and errors are followed and documented
